object_a.label: cabinet
object_a.description: dark wood cabinets centered above stove and microwave
object_a.long_form_open_description: Dark wood cabinets centered on the back wall, flanking and above the built-in microwave and stove. Same finish as the left cabinets, providing a continuous cabinetry line across the kitchen back wall.
object_a.location_relative_to_other_objects: Immediately above and to the sides of the microwave and range; between the central window and the left cabinetry run.
